---
name: Agent Submission
about: Submit a new agent definition to the catalog
title: '[AGENT] '
labels: 'agent-submission'
---

## Agent Details

**Name:** (e.g., `code/linter`)
**Category:** (code / research / data / devops / content / orchestration)
**Description:** (one line)

## System Prompt

```
(paste the system prompt)
```

## Why This Agent?

- What problem does it solve?
- What makes it different from existing agents in the catalog?

## Works With

- List agents it pairs well with

## Recommended Pattern

- Which orchestration pattern works best?

## Checklist

- [ ] YAML follows the [agent definition format](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#agent-definition-format)
- [ ] System prompt is 10-30 lines of practical instructions
- [ ] Cost profile is realistic
- [ ] works_with references existing catalog agents
